allow: PowerShell($programs = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.winget\\links\\gh.exe"\); foreach \($p in $programs\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } else { Write-Output "NOT: $p" } })
